basics.name: Armando Peña Tamayo
basics.label: Senior Full-Stack Engineer | Next.js + Supabase + AI & Automations
basics.summary: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 8 years of experience specializing in building fast, modern, and scalable web applications using Next.js, Supabase, and Vercel. Expert in AI integrations (OpenAI/Claude) and powerful workflow automations with n8n. I help startups and businesses launch products faster, reduce infrastructure costs, and automate repetitive processes.

work.name: NTSprint
work.summary: Independently designed and implemented a complete AI-powered document generation system for an insurance company. Led the entire architecture and development: Next.js + React + TypeScript frontend on Vercel, Node.js backend, Supabase (Postgres + Auth), and custom OpenAI Assistants.

work.name: NTSprint
work.summary: Developed and maintained microservices using AWS Lambda with Node.js and Express. Implemented centralized logging, automatic email notifications, and performance optimizations across multiple APIs.

work.name: NTSprint
work.summary: Developed and maintained two Angular applications (admin and client-facing) with Tailwind CSS, integrated with Lumen BFF and Squidex CMS. Delivered SEO improvements, performance optimizations, and code refactoring.

work.name: Aleph Engineer
work.summary: Modernized a legacy Angular + Rails application. Upgraded Angular, fixed 800 broken tests, implemented CI/CD pipeline, and reduced deployment costs by 50%.

work.name: Aleph Engineer
work.summary: Led the rebuild of an Ionic + Angular mobile app. Optimized authentication, Google Maps integration, and Laravel backend, significantly reducing server costs and improving user retention.

work.name: Freelance Projects
work.summary: Developed multiple web applications for event management, international remittances, and HR systems for clients in LATAM.

projects.name: AI Insurance Document Generator
projects.description: Full AI-powered system for automatic legal document generation in the insurance industry. Built with modern stack and custom OpenAI assistants.

projects.name: n8n AI Automation Platform
projects.description: Advanced automation hub using n8n + AI. Includes lead generation workflows, WhatsApp bots, and seamless Supabase integrations.

projects.name: SaaS Starter Template
projects.description: Production-ready SaaS template with auth, dashboard, subscriptions and AI features. Designed to launch MVPs in under a week.
